requirement_topic.en: MTC Mandatory Homologación — Radio and Telecom Terminal Equipment
requirement_topic.zh: MTC强制型式认证——无线电及电信终端设备
requirement_topic.zht: MTC強制型式認證——無線電及電信終端設備

summary.en: All radio and telecommunications terminal equipment — including Wi-Fi (2.4 GHz / 5 GHz), Bluetooth, ZigBee, cellular, and other IoT radio devices — must obtain an MTC homologación certificate from the Ministerio de Transportes y Comunicaciones before importation or commercial sale in Peru. The MTC-assigned approval number must appear on the device label in Spanish. Legal basis: TUO de la Ley de Telecomunicaciones DS 013-93-TCC and implementing MTC resolutions. OSIPTEL provides regulatory oversight and market surveillance.
summary.zh: 所有无线电及电信终端设备——包括Wi-Fi（2.4 GHz/5 GHz）、蓝牙、ZigBee、蜂窝及其他物联网无线设备——在进口或商业销售前须取得MTC（交通通信部）颁发的型式认证证书。MTC指定的认证编号须以西班牙语标注于设备标签上。法律依据：《电信法》TUO DS 013-93-TCC及MTC实施决议。OSIPTEL负责监管监督和市场监察。
summary.zht: 所有無線電及電信終端設備——包括Wi-Fi（2.4 GHz/5 GHz）、藍牙、ZigBee、蜂窩及其他物聯網無線設備——在進口或商業銷售前須取得MTC（交通通信部）頒發的型式認證證書。MTC指定的認證編號須以西班牙語標注於設備標籤上。法律依據：《電信法》TUO DS 013-93-TCC及MTC實施決議。OSIPTEL負責監管監督和市場監察。

standards_or_laws: TUO de la Ley de Telecomunicaciones DS 013-93-TCC

summary.en: MIIT/SRRC radio type approval is required in China for intentional radiators (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular). MIIT Network Access License (NAL) is required for telecom terminal equipment connecting to public networks. CCC (China Compulsory Certification) covers certain products that incorporate RF components within its scope. GB standards (GB 9254 / GB 17625 for EMC; GB 4943.1 / GB 62368-1 for electrical safety) form the technical basis.
summary.zh: 中国要求有意辐射体（Wi-Fi、蓝牙、蜂窝）须取得MIIT/SRRC无线电型号核准。接入公共网络的电信终端设备须取得MIIT网络进网许可（NAL）。中国强制认证（CCC）涵盖部分含RF组件的产品。GB标准（EMC适用GB 9254/GB 17625；电气安全适用GB 4943.1/GB 62368-1）构成技术基础。
summary.zht: 中國要求有意輻射體（Wi-Fi、藍牙、蜂窩）須取得MIIT/SRRC無線電型號核准。接入公共網路的電信終端設備須取得MIIT網路進網許可（NAL）。中國強制認證（CCC）涵蓋部分含RF組件的產品。GB標準（EMC適用GB 9254/GB 17625；電氣安全適用GB 4943.1/GB 62368-1）構成技術基礎。

gap.en: SRRC, MIIT NAL, FCC, CE, and CCC approvals are NOT recognised by MTC for Peru market access. A separate MTC homologación must be obtained for every device model prior to importation or commercial sale. The MTC approval number must appear on the product label in Spanish. Peru is not party to any mutual recognition agreement covering radio equipment with China.
gap.zh: SRRC、MIIT NAL、FCC、CE和CCC核准均不被MTC认可用于进入秘鲁市场。每个设备型号在进口或商业销售前均须单独取得MTC型式认证。MTC认证编号须以西班牙语标注于产品标签上。秘鲁未与中国签订涵盖无线电设备的相互认可协议。
gap.zht: SRRC、MIIT NAL、FCC、CE和CCC核准均不被MTC認可用於進入秘魯市場。每個設備型號在進口或商業銷售前均須單獨取得MTC型式認證。MTC認證編號須以西班牙語標注於產品標籤上。秘魯未與中國簽訂涵蓋無線電設備的相互認可協議。

source.publisher: MTC — Ministerio de Transportes y Comunicaciones del Perú

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] MTC homologación is mandatory for all radio and telecom terminal equipment in Peru. No equivalence is granted to SRRC, CCC, FCC, or CE approvals. Chinese exporters must submit a separate MTC homologación application for each device model, provide technical documentation, and obtain an MTC approval number before importation or sale. Display of the approval number on a Spanish-language label is required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] MTC型式认证对秘鲁所有无线电及电信终端设备为强制性要求。不承认SRRC、CCC、FCC或CE核准的等效性。中国出口商须就每个设备型号单独提交MTC型式认证申请，提供技术文件并在进口或销售前取得MTC认证编号，且须在西班牙语标签上标注该编号。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] MTC型式認證對秘魯所有無線電及電信終端設備為強制性要求。不承認SRRC、CCC、FCC或CE核准的等效性。中國出口商須就每個設備型號單獨提交MTC型式認證申請，提供技術文件並在進口或銷售前取得MTC認證編號，且須在西班牙語標籤上標注該編號。
